Simulate a Machine with external inputs

Source: R/dynam.R
simulate_machine.Rd

Simulate a Machine with external inputs

Usage

simulate_machine(
  m,
  initial,
  times,
  input_fn = function(t) numeric(m@ninputs),
  params = list()
)

Arguments

m

A continuous Machine

initial

Named numeric vector of initial state

times

Numeric vector of output times

input_fn

Function (t) -> numeric vector of inputs

params

Parameter list

Value

A data.frame

On this page
